---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Report missing, incorrect, or unclear documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

**Which document or area needs improvement?**
e.g. HOW_TO_CONTRIBUTE.md, firmware datasheet tooling, modernisation workflow

**What is wrong or missing?**
A clear description of the problem with the current docs.

**Suggested improvement**
What should it say instead, or what should be added?

**Additional context**
Any links, references, or screenshots.
